rulesStrings.li:
questDescription->[faction_name] is ready to formally promote [pawn_definite] to the rank of [newTitle] and grant them a level [psylinkLevel] cryptid insight in an inauguration ceremony.

The Enclave envoy will arrive by vertibird and conduct the ceremony.

The envoy will only confer the promotion if the presidential suite requirements are met. There is a chance of earning bonus votes, depending on how many personnel attend the ceremony. Additionally, every attendee receives a morale boost.

You can betray the envoy to seize cryptid neuroformers, but this will make [faction_name] your enemy.

If you miss or fail this ceremony, there will be another opportunity later. If the envoy or guards are harmed for any reason, there will be diplomatic consequences.

questDescription->[intro]The [asker_faction_leaderTitle] of [asker_faction_name] conducts personal inspections of Colonel-rank commands upon request. Invite them, satisfy their operational requirements for [shuttleDelayTicks_duration], and all of you can board the vertibird to the Enclave Moon Base. You may then join the Enclave command staff, or forge a new life off-world among the stars. 
Achieving the rank of Colonel means completing missions to accumulate [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] with [asker_faction_name]. It may take years to finally reach the rank of Colonel. 
During the visit, you must keep the [asker_faction_leaderTitle]'s morale above [lodgersMoodThreshold_percent]. This means providing proper quarters and facilities.[threatsInfo] 
The [asker_faction_leaderTitle] will bring four personal guards and place them under your command. You must house these guards, but the [asker_faction_leaderTitle] will not object if they are killed or demoralized. 
You must keep the visitors at [map_definite] and not send them elsewhere. If you fail this mission or relocate, you will have another opportunity later.
intro(sameQuestsCount==0)->You have found a path off this planet!\n\n
intro(sameQuestsCount>=1)->You have been given another chance at Enclave ascent.\n\n

threatsInfo(allowViolentQuests==true,priority=1)->\n\nOthers will take the opportunity to try to eliminate the [asker_faction_leaderTitle], and will attack with great intensity. Be prepared to defend.

questDescription->[asker_nameFull], a [asker_royalTitleInCurrentFaction] of [asker_faction_name] is calling from nearby. [asker_possessive] guards were killed in an ambush. [asker_pronoun] escaped, but is now being followed by (*Threat)a manhunting [animalKindDef_label](/Threat).
[asker_nameDef] wants you to keep [asker_objective] safe at [map_definite] for a few hours until [asker_possessive] vertibird can come to pick [asker_objective] up. [asker_pronoun] will grant [royalFavorReward] [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] to whoever accepts this mission. This is enough [asker_faction_royalFavorLabel] to receive the rank of Private, and all benefits that come with it - including the first level of cryptid insight.

questDescription->In order to formally authorize the succession of [titleHeir_nameFull] to [titleHolder_nameFull]'s position, you must construct a monument. 
The monument will be [monumentSize] in size and will require these resources (total value [monumentRequiredResourcesMarketValue_money]): 
[monumentRequiredResources] 
Failing to complete the monument within 20 days is considered a breach of contract. Your relations with [asker_factionName] will fall by 25, and the succession will not proceed. 
If the monument is destroyed within [keepMonumentTicks_duration] days after completion, your relations with [asker_factionName] will fall by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].

value.text: [asker_nameDef] is offended that you promised to formalize the succession, but did not complete the monument within the prescribed time.\n\nYou lost 25 goodwill with [asker_faction_name].

[asker_nameDef] is offended that you promised to formalize the succession, but allowed the monument to be destroyed shortly after completion.\n\nYour relations with [asker_faction_name] have fallen by [goodwillChangeIfMonumentDestroyed].

rulesStrings.li: questDescription->A wanderer joins with shell shock

Operation.xpath: Defs/RulePackDef[defName="QuestHospitalityCommon"]/rulePack/rulesStrings/li[.="paralyzedInfo->[lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] [areIs] suffering from paralytic abasia and must be kept in bed."]

value.li: paralyzedInfo->[lodgersLabelSingOrPluralDef] [areIs] suffering from shell shock and must be kept in bed.
